---
title: "Create an accordion"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Create an accordion}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(signature)
```

<!-- This vignette is generated by fusen: do not edit by hand -->

See Boostrap documentation for more details:
https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.1/components/accordion/

An accordion is a vertically collapsing boxes. 
An accordion got some accordion items. Each item has is own body.

You can pass whatever you want in the body of the item.


# Create accordion item

```{r examples-accordion-item}
accordion_item(
  accordion_id = "accordion",
  item_id = "accordition-item",
  item_header = "Title",
  buttonid = "itemButton",
  p("This is a text"),
  p("Inside an accordion item")
)
```

# Create an accordion

Finally you can create your accordion as a `taglist` of `accordion-item`:


```{r examples-accordion}
accordion(
  id = "myaccordion",
  items = tagList()
)

accordion(
  id = "myaccordion",
  items = tagList(
    accordion_item(
      accordion_id = "myaccordion",
      item_id = "accordition-item1",
      item_header = "Title 1",
      buttonid = "itemButton1",
      p("This is a text"),
      p("Inside an accordion item")
    ),
    accordion_item(
      accordion_id = "myaccordion",
      item_id = "accordition-item2",
      item_header = "Title 2",
      buttonid = "itemButton2",
      p("This is a text"),
      p("Inside an accordion item")
    )
  )
)
```
